name: Sunblast Angel
oracleText: Flying When this creature enters, destroy all tapped creatures.

name: Memoricide
oracleText: Choose a nonland card name. Search target player's graveyard, hand, and library for any number of cards with that name and exile them. Then that player shuffles.

name: Steel Hellkite

name: Wurmcoil Engine
